title: ferray-ma: set_mask_flat uses iter_mut().nth(flat_idx) — O(n) per call
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

set_mask_flat() in masked_array.rs uses 'self.mask.iter_mut().nth(flat_idx)' which is O(n) for non-contiguous arrays. For contiguous arrays it should use as_slice_mut()[flat_idx] directly. For a loop that sets many mask values, this becomes O(n^2). Same pattern as ferray-core's flat_index issue (#350).
